{"query":"UPDATE produktionsAnlagenConfig SET intTp_ID = '2',\r\n unt_ID = '1',mst_ID = '',startDate = '2021',endDate = '2021',startWeek = '1',endWeek = '18',ending = '0',note = 'prd1',einheitControlSys = '1',iBdeType = '1',mstIMw = 'prd1' WHERE prd_id = '2059' AND anl_id = '1092' AND anl_col = 'anl01_ID' "}
